event: Military column moving through snowy Balkan mountains
description: A column of soldiers and horses traverses a steep snow-covered mountain slope. The figures appear as small dark silhouettes against the vast expanse of white snow. The brushwork is loose and impressionistic, emphasizing the immensity of the landscape and the smallness of the human figures. Bare vegetation is visible at the edges of the composition.

_meta.title: Moving columns of M.D. Skobelev through the Balkans
